global.description: The ad features a full canvas background with the 'PixelForge' logo positioned at the top left. The main subject is highlighted by a bold headline 'Beat your rivals' and supporting body text 'Free rewards for new players' centrally placed. A prominent 'Shop now' call-to-action button is located at the bottom center. Decorative elements showcasing game visuals are strategically placed to enhance the theme.
global.visual_style: Vibrant and engaging design with a focus on gaming elements.
global.main_message: Encouragement to engage with the game through rewards and competition.

elements.label: PixelForge text logo
elements.description: The logo of the app, positioned at the top left corner of the crop.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: Supporting descriptive text below the headline.

elements.label: Call to Action Button
elements.description: A button with the text 'Shop now' positioned towards the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Play symbol
elements.description: A right-facing triangle icon indicating play or action, located in the upper right corner of the crop.

elements.label: Segmented crop of game elements
elements.description: A crop showing two circular game elements on a blue background, likely part of a game interface.

elements.label: Segmented crop of a game element
elements.description: A small blue square with a circular shape inside, likely part of a game interface.

elements.label: Segmented crop of a game element
elements.description: A cropped section showing a blue square with a dark circle, likely part of a game interface.

elements.label: Segmented crop from ad
elements.description: A cropped section of the ad showing a blue background with a circular shape and a rectangular area.

embedding_texts.global_text: Mobile ad for PixelForge Legends promoting gameplay and rewards.
